summary: Iteration 18 - Google Drive Integration Testing Complete. All backend endpoints verified: GET /api/integrations/status (returns google_drive, onedrive, dropbox status), GET /api/integrations/google-drive/connect (307 redirect to Google OAuth), DELETE /api/integrations/google-drive/disconnect (success), POST /api/integrations/google-drive/attach (attaches Drive file to card), GET /api/integrations/google-drive/files (401 when not connected). Frontend verified: Integrations page shows 3 cards (Google Drive with Connect button, OneDrive/Dropbox with Coming Soon badges), Card detail modal has 'Attach from Google Drive' button, Drive file picker shows 'not connected' state with link to Integrations page. Fixed auth issue where Connect button redirect wasn't passing session token.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/integrations/status returns status for google_drive, onedrive, dropbox
Backend: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/connect returns 307 redirect to Google OAuth
Backend: DELETE /api/integrations/google-drive/disconnect returns success message
Backend: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/files returns 401 when not connected
Backend: POST /api/integrations/google-drive/attach requires card_id and file_id
Backend: POST /api/integrations/google-drive/attach works with valid card
Backend: GET /api/integrations/status requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Backend: Login flow works with admin credentials
Backend: Workspaces endpoint accessible after login
Backend: Board endpoint accessible with known board ID
Frontend: Integrations page (/integrations) loads correctly
Frontend: Google Drive card displayed with Connect button (active, not disabled)
Frontend: OneDrive card displayed with 'Coming Soon' badge and disabled button
Frontend: Dropbox card displayed with 'Coming Soon' badge and disabled button
Frontend: Google Drive Connect button redirects to Google OAuth (with session token)
Frontend: Card detail modal has 'Attach from Google Drive' button
Frontend: Drive file picker opens when clicking 'Attach from Google Drive'
Frontend: Drive file picker shows 'Google Drive not connected' message when not connected
Frontend: Drive file picker has 'Go to Integrations' button
Frontend: Login and dashboard navigation work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Backend /api/integrations/google-drive/connect now accepts session token via query param (required for browser redirect which doesn't include Authorization header)
Fixed: Frontend IntegrationsPage.js handleConnect() now passes odapto_session_token from localStorage as query param
Google OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch error is expected - preview URL not configured in Google Console (as noted in agent context)
All integration endpoints properly protected with authentication
Drive file picker correctly handles 'not connected' state with user-friendly message and link to Integrations page
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Integration_Document.pdf attachment on card_da16e8e57260 during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified Google Drive integration features. Key implementations: 1) Backend endpoints at /api/integrations/* for status, connect, disconnect, files, attach. 2) Frontend IntegrationsPage.js shows 3 integration cards with proper states. 3) DriveFilePicker.js component handles file browsing and 'not connected' state. 4) CardDetailModal.js has 'Attach from Google Drive' button. 5) Fixed auth issue: connect endpoint now accepts token via query param since browser redirect doesn't include headers. 6) Google OAuth won't complete in preview env due to redirect_uri not configured in Google Console. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_integrations.py

integrations_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/status returns google_drive, onedrive, dropbox connection status

google_drive_connect_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/connect returns 307 redirect to Google OAuth with proper scopes

google_drive_disconnect_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/integrations/google-drive/disconnect removes integration and returns success

google_drive_files_endpoint.details: GET /api/integrations/google-drive/files returns 401 when not connected (expected behavior)

google_drive_attach_endpoint.details: POST /api/integrations/google-drive/attach attaches Drive file to card with proper validation

integrations_page_ui.details: Shows 3 cards: Google Drive (Connect button), OneDrive (Coming Soon), Dropbox (Coming Soon)

drive_file_picker_ui.details: Opens from card detail modal, shows 'not connected' state with link to Integrations page

card_detail_drive_button.details: 'Attach from Google Drive' button present in card detail modal attachments section

login_and_dashboard.details: Login with admin credentials and dashboard navigation work correctly

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: Google Drive Connect button redirect failed with 'Not authenticated' error
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: Browser redirect via window.location.href doesn't include Authorization header
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Modified backend to accept session token via query param, updated frontend to pass odapto_session_token from localStorage
